headline: What to Expect From Packaging Corporation's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Packaging Corporation is set to announce its second-quarter earnings next month, and Wall Street expects the company’s EPS to fall by a single digit.

raw.headline: What to Expect From Packaging Corporation's Next Quarterly Earnings Report

headline: 1 Mid-Cap Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Avoid
summary: Mid-cap stocks often strike the right balance between having proven business models and market opportunities that can support $100 billion corporations. However, they face intense competition from scaled industry giants and can be disrupted by new innovative players vying for a slice of the pie.

raw.headline: 1 Mid-Cap Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Avoid
